events.event_title: SDNY Grand Jury Subpoena: Witness Summoned to 40 Foley Square for Epstein Sex Trafficking (Jul 2019)
events.description: SDNY Grand Jury subpoena issued July 5, 2019 by US Attorney Geoffrey Berman, requiring a witness to appear at 40 Foley Square Room 220 on July 24, 2019 for Epstein sex trafficking investigation (18 U.S.C. §§ 1591, 2421, 2422, 2423, 371).
events.nexus_reasoning: The grand jury subpoena is part of the SDNY criminal investigation of Jeffrey Epstein for sex trafficking (18 U.S.C. § 1591), directly related to the Epstein case.

evidence.excerpt:
Grand Jury Subpoena

United States Courthouse, 40 Foley Square, Room 220, in the Borough of Manhattan, City of New York, New York
Appearance Date: July 24, 2019
Appearance Time: 10:00 a.m.

to testify and give evidence in regard to an alleged violation of:
18 U.S.C. §§ 1591, 2421, 2422, 2423, 371
